description_long: This is a semi-automatic pistol-caliber carbine with a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent wooden pistol grip. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, with a visible bolt and ejection port on the side. A stripper clip loaded with cartridges is inserted into the top of the receiver, indicating a top-loading internal magazine system. The trigger guard is rounded and metallic, and the grip panels are made of dark wood with a smooth finish. The muzzle is simple and unadorned, with no visible attachments. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century military or police carbines, compact and utilitarian.
description: A compact, dark metal carbine with a wooden pistol grip and a top-loading internal magazine using a stripper clip. The design is utilitarian, with a long barrel and minimal external attachments.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular muzzle and the narrow profile of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the wooden grip, trigger, and the top-loading stripper clip with visible cartridges.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the receiver and grip, with the barrel aligned directly away from the viewer.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the wooden grip, trigger, and the stripper clip, mirroring the left side but with slightly different mechanical details visible.
